name: hero-artifact
primary_request: A retro adventure-game style illustration of a family letter on a desk beside an oil lamp, with a river crossing visible beyond the window.
style_medium: dithered pixel-art illustration with hand-painted mood
composition_framing: wide cinematic composition, letter dominant in the foreground, lamp on the right, river horizon beyond, enough negative space for UI overlays
lighting_mood: quiet dusk, warm lamplight against deep teal night tones
color_palette: inspired by Monkey Island 1 but restrained: dusk navy, sea teal, faded jade, ochre sand, coral rust, parchment cream

name: recovery-photo
primary_request: A dithered illustration of an old family photo being annotated and indexed on a dark archival desk.
composition_framing: three-quarter top-down view, photo print large in frame, indexing cards and marks nearby
lighting_mood: warm archival worklight with cool shadow edges
color_palette: same Monkey Island 1 inspired palette as the hero scene
constraints: same world and palette as hero-artifact

name: voice-interview
primary_request: A kitchen-table korero being recorded, with two family members in conversation and a simple microphone or recorder present.
style_medium: retro dithered illustration with soft, expressive silhouettes
composition_framing: medium-wide interior scene, intimate but readable at small sizes
lighting_mood: first-light morning warmth, calm and attentive
color_palette: same restrained Monkey Island 1 inspired palette

name: lineage-map
primary_request: An atmospheric branching river-and-stars composition that symbolises lineage, memory, and connection.
style_medium: abstract retro adventure-game illustration with dithered gradients
composition_framing: vertical and spacious enough to sit behind a UI graph overlay
lighting_mood: night sky, low glow, ceremonial quiet
color_palette: same Monkey Island 1 inspired palette with strong teal and ochre contrast

name: transmission-thread
primary_request: A memory card or letter being passed through a family message thread, visualised as connected cards and gentle glowing paths.
style_medium: retro dithered illustration with understated magical realism
composition_framing: balanced frame with one main card on the left and connected cards on the right
lighting_mood: warm transmission glow against deep navy shadows
color_palette: same Monkey Island 1 inspired palette as the rest of the site
constraints: same world as the other four scenes
